data.message: Wondering if it's too late to start over in a completely different field? In 10 weeks, our Ethical Hacking and Penetration Testing track takes you through vulnerability scanning, penetration testing tools and real attack simulations, with instructors reviewing your work along the way. By the end, you'll have what you need to apply for roles like Security Consultant, Penetration Tester or Vulnerability Analyst. We're offering a free info session this weekend if you want to ask questions first. Seats for this cohort are almost full. Apply now, we'd love to have you in the next cohort.
